FETS — Exam day checklist
==========================

The night before
- [ ] Valid photo ID (same name as registration)
- [ ] Exam confirmation email (printed or on phone as allowed)
- [ ] Centre address saved / route planned (Calicut or Kochi)
- [ ] Alarm set — aim to arrive 30+ minutes early

Morning of
- [ ] Light meal; avoid excessive caffeine if it makes you jittery
- [ ] Phone charged; plan where you will store it (lockers on site)

At the centre
- [ ] Check in at reception with ID
- [ ] Use lockers for bags, watches, and study materials
- [ ] Listen to proctor instructions; ask if anything is unclear

During the exam
- [ ] Watch the timer; skip and flag hard items if the format allows
- [ ] If anxious: three slow breaths, then continue

After
- [ ] Confirm you have all belongings from lockers
- [ ] Note follow-up steps from your exam provider (results timeline, etc.)

Questions? Call +91 9605686000 or email edu@fets.in
